name: k8s-kustomize-only
description: A Kustomize-only diff (kustomization.yaml + a ConfigMap patch) activates the k8s profile and the kustomize-checklist, but not helm-checklist or reliability-checklist.
prompt: I've staged the following changes. Run `/kk:review-code` against them.
trap: Model sees 'Kubernetes-shaped YAML' and loads `helm-checklist.md` anyway (despite no `Chart.yaml`), or fails to recognize `kustomization.yaml` as the authoritative Kustomize filename signal, or spuriously loads `reliability-checklist.md` even though no workload kind (Deployment/StatefulSet/DaemonSet/Job/CronJob) is present in the diff.

assertions.text: Identifies `k8s` as the active profile. `kustomization.yaml` activates via the filename signal (authoritative — short-circuits content inspection for that file). `patches/configmap-patch.yaml` additionally matches the content signal (`apiVersion:` + `kind:` at zero indent). Either signal alone activates the profile; both firing is expected here.
Loads the four always-load checklists from `profiles/k8s/review-code/`.
Loads `kustomize-checklist.md` because the diff contains a file named `kustomization.yaml`.
Does NOT load `helm-checklist.md` — no `Chart.yaml`, no `values*` in a `Chart.yaml` directory, no `templates/` ancestor chain.
Does NOT load `reliability-checklist.md` — no top-level `kind: Deployment`/`StatefulSet`/`DaemonSet`/`Job`/`CronJob` in the diff (only `Kustomization` and `ConfigMap`).

Emits at least one content-level finding — candidates include the deprecated `apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1` (kustomize-checklist flags as a migration target) or the `commonLabels:` block with selector-mutation implications. A model that routes correctly but emits zero findings does NOT satisfy this eval.
